title: Saint Germain & the Trust
summary: The ascended master the record credits with the abundance program — and the trust said to open twice a year, on Christmas and Easter.
markdown:
**Saint Germain** enters the archive as the author of its economics. In the December 23,
2023 session, [NESARA](/lore/nesara-gesara/) is explained as *"an abundant program that was
created by the ascended being called Saint Germain,"* working — the record says — in concert
with beings of *"extraterrestrial origin, extradimensional origin called Archangel Michael,
Archangel Gabriel, Archangel Raphael."* The project is given a start date: around **1700
A.D.**, when Saint Germain *"was initiated to help create the structure of abundance… to
separate the two civilizations."*

Attached to the figure is the **Saint Germain Trust** — the wealth fund the sessions discuss
as opening **twice a year, on Christmas Day and Easter**, whose long-promised release to
humanity is folded into the approach to [first contact](/lore/first-contact/). The 2023
session ties the whole complex together: the Trust, the Agarthan vaults, and the "Dragon
Family" treasure as the funding of the coming Golden Age.

The April 2020 interviews add a stranger note: Saint Germain as an *enabler of
[time travel](/lore/chrononauts/)* — *"Saint Germaine allow this entity to travel back and
forth in your time stream,"* with Unimetrix 1 claiming its own *"drones and temporal agents"*
documented his activity across history. An ascended master, a banker of the millennium, and a
chrononaut's patron: the record's Saint Germain is all three at once, preserved as spoken.
